diff: The documents herein contain the terms that govern this Instance's Pioneer Incentive Pool and its address.
description: Removes the requirement that 80% of Pioneer Incentive Pool funds be used for third-party USDS adoption incentives, allowing the Pioneer Prime to retain 100% of the funds.
